initial_program:
inner(R,C,V) :- input(R,C,V), V != 0, V != 8.
dummy(R,C) :- true.
Rmin(N) :- N = #min{R : inner(R,_,_) }.
Rmax(N) :- N = #max{R : inner(R,_,_) }.
Cmin(N) :- N = #min{C : inner(_,C,_) }.
Cmax(N) :- N = #max{C : inner(_,C,_) }.
rotated(R_out,C_out,R_in,C_in,V) :- inner(R_in,C_in,V), Rmax(Rmax), Cmin(Cmin), R_out = C_in - Cmin, C_out = Rmax - R_in, dummy(R_out,C_out).
inside_rect(R,C,Rmin,Rmax,Cmin,Cmax) :- R >= Rmin, R <= Rmax, C >= Cmin, C <= Cmax, Rmin(Rmin), Rmax(Rmax), Cmin(Cmin), Cmax(Cmax).
:- output(R,C,Color), input(R,C,8), Color != 8.
:- rotated(R_out,C_out,R_in,C_in,V), output(R_out,C_out,Color), Color != V.
:- output(R,C,Color), input(R,C,0), not inside_rect(R,C,Rmin,Rmax,Cmin,Cmax), Color != 0.
output_cell(R,C) :- true.
1 { output(R,C,Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).
#show output/3.
